query:
SELECT
     id AS "id!",
     name AS "name!",
     email AS "email!",
     role AS "role!",
     created_at AS "createdAt!"
   FROM public.list_users(
     COALESCE($role, NULL::public.user_role),
     COALESCE($search, NULL::text),
     COALESCE($afterId, NULL::bigint),
     $limit
   )
